title: Roll Delight
description: An add-on that adds more sushi items to farmer's delight!
body:
![Roll Delight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d85e5db0732c146986211b66e50c1e0cc868f9f3_0.webp)
___________________________________________________________________________
This mod adds new sushi/rolls to Farmer's Delight. The items include:
- Ancient Roll - Crafted from sniffer flowers as a rare food item
- Golden Roll - Crafted from iron & gold to give a lot of saturation
- Cooked Nether Wart - Crafted like cooked rice
- Nether Roll - Crafted from porkchop and cooked nether wart, acting as a good nether food
- Rice Roll - "Yeah bro I love sushi"
- Tobiko Roll - Crafted from rice roll slices and frogspawn, which can be obtained via shears
- Mushroom Roll - Crafted from cabbage and a mushroom colony
- Amazing Salmon Roll - Crafted from a lot of salmon, mirroring the Amazing Tuna Roll
- Legendary Medley - Crafted from Mushroom, Amazing Salmon, & Tobiko rolls
- Mythical Medley - Crafted from Ancient, Golden, and Nether rolls
- Chopsticks - Use in main hand with a roll, slice, or rice in off-hand to gain potion effects
- Wrapped Chopsticks - Neat way to place down chopsticks for deco and storage
___________________________________________________________________________
This mod also goes great with [Cultural Delights!](https://modrinth.com/mod/cultural-delights)

If there are any bugs, please report them; I cannot backport to Forge 1.20.1 until MCreator's plugin is updated, so wait until then.

If you want to put this in a modpack, you are very welcome to do that! However, _please do not repost this mod without credit_. Thank you!
